card_description: Pinocchio is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick analyzes a "Medieval Diptych" dream revealing that Christ's inner nature is feminine ("SHE" / "SECRET" / "St."

linked_segments.summary: Dick analyzes a "Medieval Diptych" dream revealing that Christ's inner nature is feminine ("SHE" / "SECRET" / "St. Sophia"). He treats the human Jesus as a "puppet" (Pinocchio) animated by this female
